# Shermco

Shermco is a testing, maintenance, commissioning, and electrical-services specialist that matters when substations, switchgear, transfer systems, and power trains need to be accepted, energized, and handed over safely.

## Why it matters
- Adds a real acceptance-testing and commissioning layer that sits between installed gear and trusted operation.
- Strengthens the graph around energization, turnover, and operational readiness.
- Helps close the gap between packaged electrical delivery and live-site confidence.

## Best fit
- Projects with major switchgear, ATS, substation, or relay-testing scope.
- Programs nearing energization or phased turnover.
- Owners who need more than installation and want documented readiness before handoff.

## Operational role in the graph
- Strengthens `commissioning-and-operations` and `field-services-and-maintenance`.
- Pulls `ats-and-transfer-systems`, `modular-substations`, and `power-and-electrical` into a more lived-in acceptance path.
- Makes field testing, acceptance, and energization support part of the graph instead of implied background work.
